properties.description: Dataflow to convert special characters CSV file data into Dynamic JSONCSV

typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	p_ds_stgfilepath as string,
	p_ds_snkstgpath as string,
	p_ds_snkstgfilename as string
}
source(output(
		PROJECT_NUMBER as string,
		ID as string,
		NAME as string,
		STATE as string,
		DESCRIPTION as string,
		POLICY as string,
		TITLE as string,
		PROJECT as string,
		TIMESTAMP as string,
		ORIGINATOR as string,
		NOTES as string,
		MEASURE_OF_SUCCESS as string,
		RISK_VISIBILITY as string,
		ACTUAL_END_DATE as string,
		ACTUAL_START_DATE as string,
		ESTIMATED_END_DATE as string,
		ESTIMATED_START_DATE as string,
		COMMENTS as string,
		RISK_HANDLING_PLAN_TECHNIQUE as string,
		RISK_HANDLING_PLAN_TECHNIQUE_DESCRIPTION as string,
		ESTIMATED_COST as string,
		ABATEMENT_PLAN as string,
		RISK_TYPE as string,
		RISK_PROBABILITY as string,
		RISK_CATEGORY as string,
		RISK_FACTOR as string,
		RISK_IMPACT as string,
		RISK_MANAGER_ALTERNATE as string,
		MDR_SUBCATEGORY as string,
		MDR_RISKFUNCTION as string,
		INCLUDE_RISK_PROJECT as string,
		WATCH_LIST as string,
		RESPONSIBLE_IPT as string,
		IMPACTED_WBS_NUMBER as string,
		MAJOR_SYSTEM_OR_COMPONENT_OR_FUNCTIONAL_AREA as string,
		RISK_ASSIGNEE as string,
		RISK_MANAGER as string,
		RISK_AREA_COORDINATOR as string,
		RISK_STATEMENT as string,
		PRIMARY_RISK_CATEGORY as string,
		RISK_TIME_FRAME as string,
		ACTUAL_RISK_FACTOR_LEVEL as string,
		ACTUAL_RISK_FACTOR_COLOR as string,
		LAST_MONTH_ENTERED as string,
		PLANNED_MONTH as string,
		RISK_CONTROL_BOARD_ACTIVITY_LEVEL as string,
		RISK_CONTROL_BOARD_MEETING_DATE as string,
		RISK_CONTROL_BOARD_COMMENTS as string,
		MDR_SCHEDULE_IMPACT as string,
		MDR_CONSEQUENCE as string,
		RISK_COST as string,
		MAXIMUM_ACTUAL_CONSEQUENCE_VALUE as string,
		MAXIMUM_ACTUAL_LIKELIHOOD_VALUE as string,
		STATEMENT_OF_RISK as string,
		ORIGINATED as string,
		RPN_ID as string,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE1 as string,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE2 as string,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE3 as string,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE4 as string,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE5 as string,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE6 as string,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE7 as string,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE8 as string,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE9 as string,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE10 as string,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE11 as string,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE12 as string,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE13 as string,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE14 as string,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE15 as string,
		RPN_NUMBER as string,
		DELETED as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	multiLineRow: true) ~> SrcRiskDTFile
source(output(
		COLLABSPACE as string,
		ATTRIBUTE1 as string,
		ATTRIBUTE2 as string,
		ATTRIBUTE3 as string,
		ATTRIBUTE4 as string,
		ATTRIBUTE5 as string,
		ATTRIBUTE6 as string,
		ATTRIBUTE7 as string,
		ATTRIBUTE8 as string,
		ATTRIBUTE9 as string,
		ATTRIBUTE10 as string,
		ATTRIBUTE11 as string,
		ATTRIBUTE12 as string,
		ATTRIBUTE13 as string,
		ATTRIBUTE14 as string,
		ATTRIBUTE15 as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> srcRiskRFFile
SrcRiskDTFile unpivot(output(
		CKey as string,
		RValue as string
	),
	ungroupBy(PROJECT_NUMBER,
		PROJECT,
		ID,
		RPN_ID),
	lateral: false,
	ignoreNullPivots: true) ~> UnpivotRiskDTData
srcRiskRFFile select(mapColumn(
		PROJECT = COLLABSPACE,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE1 = ATTRIBUTE1,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE2 = ATTRIBUTE2,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE3 = ATTRIBUTE3,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE4 = ATTRIBUTE4,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE5 = ATTRIBUTE5,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE6 = ATTRIBUTE6,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE7 = ATTRIBUTE7,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE8 = ATTRIBUTE8,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE9 = ATTRIBUTE9,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE10 = ATTRIBUTE10,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE11 = ATTRIBUTE11,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE12 = ATTRIBUTE12,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE13 = ATTRIBUTE13,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE14 = ATTRIBUTE14,
		ATTRIBUTEVALUE15 = ATTRIBUTE15
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> selectRiskRFColumns
selectRiskRFColumns, UnpivotRiskDTData join(selectRiskRFColumns@PROJECT == UnpivotRiskDTData@PROJECT,
	joinType:'right',
	matchType:'exact',
	ignoreSpaces: false,
	broadcast: 'auto')~> joinRiskRFDTData
joinRiskRFDTData derive(CKey = case(CKey == 'ATTRIBUTEVALUE1',ATTRIBUTEVALUE1,CKey == 'ATTRIBUTEVALUE2', ATTRIBUTEVALUE2,CKey == 'ATTRIBUTEVALUE3', ATTRIBUTEVALUE3,CKey == 'ATTRIBUTEVALUE4', ATTRIBUTEVALUE4,CKey == 'ATTRIBUTEVALUE5', ATTRIBUTEVALUE5,CKey == 'ATTRIBUTEVALUE6', ATTRIBUTEVALUE6,CKey == 'ATTRIBUTEVALUE7', ATTRIBUTEVALUE7,CKey == 'ATTRIBUTEVALUE8', ATTRIBUTEVALUE8,CKey == 'ATTRIBUTEVALUE9', ATTRIBUTEVALUE9,CKey == 'ATTRIBUTEVALUE10', ATTRIBUTEVALUE10,CKey == 'ATTRIBUTEVALUE11', ATTRIBUTEVALUE11,CKey == 'ATTRIBUTEVALUE12', ATTRIBUTEVALUE12,CKey == 'ATTRIBUTEVALUE13', ATTRIBUTEVALUE13,CKey == 'ATTRIBUTEVALUE14', ATTRIBUTEVALUE14,CKey == 'ATTRIBUTEVALUE15', ATTRIBUTEVALUE15,CKey)) ~> DerivedColSwapAttributeNames
DerivedColSwapAttributeNames select(mapColumn(
		PROJECT = selectRiskRFColumns@PROJECT,
		PROJECT_NUMBER,
		ID,
		RPN_ID,
		CKey,
		RValue
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> selectSTGColumns
selectSTGColumns aggregate(groupBy(PROJECT_NUMBER,
		PROJECT,
		ID,
		RPN_ID),
	JSON_ATTRIBUTE = collect(CKey+'::'+replace(replace(RValue,'\n',' '),'\r',' '))) ~> aggregateKeyColumns
aggregateKeyColumns derive(JSON_ATTRIBUTE = '{ '+trim(replace(toString(JSON_ATTRIBUTE),'::','" : "'),'[]')+' }') ~> SnkJSONFormat
SnkJSONFormat sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	partitionFileNames:[($p_ds_snkstgfilename)],
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	mapColumn(
		PROJECT,
		PROJECT_NUMBER,
		ID,
		RPN_ID,
		JSON_ATTRIBUTE
	),
	partitionBy('hash', 1)) ~> snkJsonSTG
